findings_addressed.summary: D4 unknown-kind preflight via CHECK-constraint sentinel table replaces unsupported ELSE NULL + NOT NULL claim.
findings_addressed.primitive: CREATE TEMP TABLE _vec0_migration_assertion(check_passes INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(check_passes = 1)) + INSERT of CASE WHEN EXISTS(... kind NOT IN locked-vocab ...) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END.
findings_addressed.case_else_branch: 'article' (defence-in-depth past the preflight; preflight already guarantees no unknown kinds reach the INSERT)

findings_addressed.summary: created_at filled by strftime('%s','now') at INSERT time; removed Rust-side <now> rendering claim and lib.rs:1119 anchor.
findings_addressed.uniform_timestamp_note: SQLite documents that built-in date/time functions return the same value across all rows in a single statement when no varying arguments are passed.

findings_addressed.summary: D8 stale 'INSERT INTO vector_default_v2 ... SELECT v.rowid' reference rewritten against the staged-copy migration shape.

apply_one_verification.evidence: fathomdb-schema/src/lib.rs:276 invokes conn.execute_batch(migration.sql); :274 begins the transaction with BEGIN IMMEDIATE; :282 commits; :284 rolls back on error.
apply_one_verification.consequence: Preflight assertion can live as a prefix statement in the same migration SQL string; no Rust-side preflight or single-statement CTE workaround required.

outputs: dev/design/0.7.0-vector-quant-pack1.md (D4 + D8 edited; Fix-3 changelog appended; status -> draft fix-3)
